_source: jp402-registry discovery shape (OpenAPI doc the seller publishes at /openapi.json). This is where the qualified-invoice metadata lives — not on the live 402.
_note: Discovery/OpenAPI surface carries the key `x-jp402` (with `x-` prefix) at info-level (currency) and operation-level (invoice). registrationNumber pattern is ^T[0-9]{13}$ (適格請求書発行事業者番号).
